event: A man returning to his homeland from Siberian exile
description: A man in a dark, worn coat and headscarf walks past a wooden bench where two figures sit — one appears to be a woman in reddish tones, the other a darker figure. Behind them stands a white cottage with a dark roof and green door, surrounded by a white fence. Autumn trees with orange and red foliage rise behind the house, and a purple-hued landscape of distant hills stretches beyond. The overall palette is warm but melancholy, with earthy browns, oranges, and muted purples.

_meta.title: Back in the homeland (Back from Siberia)
